title: Sales Order
description: Represents a sales order entity in Dynamics 365 Business Central. Sales orders are documents used to record the sale of goods or services to customers. They include header information (customer, dates, payment terms) and line items specifying the products or services being sold.

id.description: The unique identifier (GUID) of the sales order

number.description: The sales order number assigned from a number series

externalDocumentNumber.description: An external reference number (e.g., a customer PO number)

orderDate.description: The date when the sales order was created

postingDate.description: The date used for posting the sales order to the general ledger

customerId.description: The unique identifier of the sell-to customer

customerNumber.description: The customer number of the sell-to customer

customerName.description: The name of the sell-to customer

billToName.description: The name of the bill-to party

billToCustomerId.description: The unique identifier of the bill-to customer

billToCustomerNumber.description: The customer number of the bill-to customer

shipToName.description: The name for the ship-to address

shipToContact.description: The contact person at the ship-to address

sellToAddressLine1.description: First line of the sell-to address

sellToAddressLine2.description: Second line of the sell-to address

sellToCity.description: The city of the sell-to address

sellToCountry.description: The country/region code of the sell-to address

sellToState.description: The state or province code of the sell-to address

sellToPostCode.description: The postal code of the sell-to address

currencyId.description: The unique identifier of the currency

currencyCode.description: The currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) for the sales order

pricesIncludeTax.description: Indicates whether the prices on the order include tax

paymentTermsId.description: The unique identifier of the payment terms

shipmentMethodId.description: The unique identifier of the shipment method

salesperson.description: The salesperson code assigned to the order

requestedDeliveryDate.description: The date the customer has requested delivery

discountAmount.description: The total invoice discount amount applied to the order

discountAppliedBeforeTax.description: Indicates whether discounts are applied before tax calculation

totalAmountExcludingTax.description: The total amount of the order excluding tax (read-only)

totalTaxAmount.description: The total tax amount on the order (read-only)

totalAmountIncludingTax.description: The total amount of the order including tax (read-only)

fullyShipped.description: Indicates whether all lines on the order have been fully shipped (read-only)

status.description: The current status of the sales order (read-only)

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The date and time the sales order was last modified (read-only)

phoneNumber.description: The phone number associated with the order

email.description: The email address associated with the order

salesOrderLines.description: The line items on the sales order

SalesOrderLine.title: Sales Order Line
SalesOrderLine.description: Represents a line item on a sales order, specifying the item, quantity, pricing, and shipping details.

id.description: The unique identifier of the sales order line

documentId.description: The ID of the parent sales order document

sequence.description: The sequence number determining line order

itemId.description: The unique identifier of the item on this line

accountId.description: The unique identifier of the G/L account (for account-type lines)

lineType.description: The type of the sales order line

lineObjectNumber.description: The number of the item, account, resource, or asset on the line

description.description: The description of the line item

description2.description: Additional description for the line item

unitOfMeasureId.description: The unique identifier of the unit of measure

unitOfMeasureCode.description: The unit of measure code (e.g., PCS, KG)

discountAppliedBeforeTax.description: Indicates whether the discount is applied before tax

taxCode.description: The tax code applied to the line

totalTaxAmount.description: The total tax amount for the line (read-only)

shipmentDate.description: The planned shipment date for the line
